title: Sindhu Exits China Open Round of 16 After Tough Fight
indian_angle: India's top female shuttler, PV Sindhu, faced a challenging exit from the China Open, highlighting the competitive international circuit.
summary: PV Sindhu lost to Chen Yufei in a hard-fought Round of 16 match at the China Open, having held multiple match points in the second game before falling in a decider.

title: Ayush Shetty Upsets World No. 11 Farhan at China Open
indian_angle: Young Indian talent Ayush Shetty secured a significant upset victory, showcasing his potential on the international stage.
summary: Ayush Shetty defeated World No. 11 Alwi Farhan at the China Open, marking a notable win for the rising Indian shuttler.

title: Sindhu Claims Japan Open Crown, Silences Doubters
indian_angle: PV Sindhu's victory at the Japan Open marks a significant return to form and a major title for India.
summary: PV Sindhu secured the Japan Open title, emotionally stating she had tears in her eyes, after answering critics who questioned her career.

title: BAI Releases Eligibility Criteria for World Junior Championships 2026
indian_angle: The Badminton Association of India has issued guidelines for the selection of players for the upcoming World Junior Championships, crucial for young Indian talent.
summary: BAI has published the eligibility criteria for Indian players aiming to participate in the BWF World Junior Championships 2026 in Cairo, Egypt.

title: 3x15 Scoring System Implemented in Indian Domestic Tournaments
indian_angle: This new scoring system will significantly impact how badminton is played in India's domestic ranking tournaments and national championships for junior categories.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has implemented a 3x15 scoring system for U-13, U-15, and U-17 domestic ranking tournaments and national championships.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Finishes Runner-Up at US Open
indian_angle: Kidambi Srikanth's strong run to the US Open final, though ending in a loss, marks a significant performance for the Indian shuttler.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open but was unable to secure the title, faltering at the last step.
